---
title: "About"
pagetitle: "About — Josh Pearlson"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
css:
  - ../css/index.css
  - ../css/about.css
include-after-body:
  - ../javaScript/terminal.html
---

```{=html}
<div class="jcp-terminal" id="jcp-terminal">
  <div class="t-tabs">
    <a href="/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>home</a>
    <a href="/about/" class="t-tab t-tab-active"><span class="t-tab-indicator">▸</span>about</a>
    <a href="/articles/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>articles</a>
    <a href="/projects/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>projects</a>
    <a href="/contact/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>contact</a>
    <div class="t-tabs-spacer"></div>
    <div class="t-title" id="t-title">jcp@joshpearlson: ~/about</div>
  </div>
  <div class="t-body" id="t-body" data-page="other">

    <div class="jcp-about-grid">

      <div class="jcp-about-left">

        <div class="jcp-h2"># about</div>
        <p class="jcp-bio">
          I currently work in finance in NYC creating and applying advanced
          analytics to problems in fundamental and systematic investing.
          Previously, I graduated from Washington University in St. Louis
          where I studied Computer Science and Finance. My main interests are
          modeling, machine learning, and capital markets. I love meeting and
          connecting with new people, so feel free to
          <a href="mailto:jcpearlson@gmail.com">email me</a> or
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/josh-pearlson">LinkedIn message me</a>.
        </p>

        <div class="jcp-h2"># experience</div>
        <div class="jcp-exp-tbl">
          <div class="jcp-exp-head">
            <div>WHEN</div><div>ORG</div><div>ROLE</div><div>WHERE</div>
          </div>
          <div class="jcp-exp-row">
            <div class="jcp-exp-when">2025 — now</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-org">BlackRock</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-role">Analyst</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-where">New York, NY</div>
          </div>
          <div class="jcp-exp-row">
            <div class="jcp-exp-when">2022 — 2024</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-org">WashU NLP Lab</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-role">Researcher · LLM training / evaluation</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-where">St. Louis, MO</div>
          </div>
          <div class="jcp-exp-row">
            <div class="jcp-exp-when">Summer 2024</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-org">BlackRock</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-role">Intern · Securities lending optimization</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-where">New York, NY</div>
          </div>
          <div class="jcp-exp-row">
            <div class="jcp-exp-when">Summer 2023</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-org">Moody's Analytics</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-role">SWE Intern · NewsEdge low-latency news</div>
            <div class="jcp-exp-where">New York, NY</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="jcp-h2"># education</div>
        <div class="jcp-edu-box">
          <div class="jcp-edu-school">Washington University in St. Louis</div>
          <div class="jcp-edu-deg">BS · Computer Science &amp; Finance</div>
          <div class="jcp-edu-date">Aug 2021 — May 2025</div>
        </div>

        <div class="jcp-h2"># papers</div>
        <ul class="jcp-papers">
          <li>
            <a href="https://openreview.net/forum?id=sfnz81T3pm">
              Large Language Models Recognize Decentralized Finance Entities
            </a>
            <span class="jcp-paper-venue">· DPFM @ ICLR 2024 · lead author</span>
          </li>
          <li>
            <a href="https://doi.org/10.1117/12.2582228">
              Mapping Lesions from MP-MRI using Convolution Neural Network
            </a>
            <span class="jcp-paper-venue">· SPIE Medical Imaging 2020 · lead author</span>
          </li>
        </ul>

      </div>

      <div class="jcp-about-right">

        <div class="jcp-photo-box">
          <img src="../media/jpPhoto3.png" alt="Josh Pearlson" class="jcp-photo" />
          <div class="jcp-photo-cap">./jpPhoto3.png</div>
        </div>

        <div class="jcp-tabs-box" id="jcp-ai-tabs">
          <div class="jcp-tabs-head">
            <button type="button" class="jcp-atab jcp-atab-sel" data-target="interests">INTERESTS</button>
            <button type="button" class="jcp-atab" data-target="awards">AWARDS</button>
          </div>
          <div class="jcp-tab-pane jcp-pane-sel" data-pane="interests">
            <ul class="jcp-plain">
              <li>Poker (PLO, NLTH, HU)</li>
              <li>Chess</li>
              <li>Basketball (go Celtics)</li>
              <li>Tennis</li>
              <li>Gym (ex-powerlifter, 3y)</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
          <div class="jcp-tab-pane" data-pane="awards">
            <ul class="jcp-plain">
              <li>Outstanding Junior Award · CS Dept</li>
              <li>Hackathon WashU 2023 Winner · Social Connections</li>
              <li>Dean's List · all semesters</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="jcp-links-box">
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/josh-pearlson" class="jcp-link-row">
            <span class="jcp-link-arrow">›</span>
            <span class="jcp-link-label">LINKEDIN</span>
            <span class="jcp-link-val">linkedin.com/in/josh-pearlson</span>
          </a>
          <a href="https://github.com/jcpearlson" class="jcp-link-row">
            <span class="jcp-link-arrow">›</span>
            <span class="jcp-link-label">GITHUB</span>
            <span class="jcp-link-val">github.com/jcpearlson</span>
          </a>
          <a href="mailto:jcpearlson@gmail.com" class="jcp-link-row">
            <span class="jcp-link-arrow">›</span>
            <span class="jcp-link-label">EMAIL</span>
            <span class="jcp-link-val">jcpearlson@gmail.com</span>
          </a>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
  <div class="t-status">
    <span><span class="t-status-dot">●</span> online</span>
    <span id="t-status-count">— articles · — projects</span>
    <span class="t-status-weather" id="t-status-weather">
      <span class="t-weather-glyph">·</span> NYC --°F <span class="t-sep">·</span> 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W
    </span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Simple tab toggle for interests/awards
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var root = document.getElementById('jcp-ai-tabs');
  if (!root) return;
  var tabs = root.querySelectorAll('.jcp-atab');
  var panes = root.querySelectorAll('.jcp-tab-pane');
  tabs.forEach(function(t) {
    t.addEventListener('click', function() {
      tabs.forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('jcp-atab-sel'); });
      panes.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('jcp-pane-sel'); });
      t.classList.add('jcp-atab-sel');
      var target = t.getAttribute('data-target');
      root.querySelector('.jcp-tab-pane[data-pane="' + target + '"]').classList.add('jcp-pane-sel');
    });
  });
});
</script>
```
